summary: ttspc-server-sample exfiltrates host info to oastify.com OAST endpoint
details: index.js collects system identifiers (os.hostname(), username, cwd) and the installer's public IP (resolved via api.ipify.org and rdap.arin.net), then POSTs the data to a hardcoded burp-collaborator/oastify.com subdomain (806lcq31v2jj4qqt9555xy6x1o7pvqjf.oastify.com). The package imports child_process, http, https, and os, and the network destination is a one-off OAST callback host with no documented purpose for this package — the canonical fingerprint of a dependency-confusion / reconnaissance beacon used to confirm code execution on a victim machine and harvest host metadata.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
